Execute or report outcome based on verified evidence
next_step.observation: Read 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and found that inbox requests are non-canonical and must be cross-checked before action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to find a specific purchase bill and confirm bank payment. Bank confirmation may be unsupported, but I should inspect the finance lane rulebook before searching records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether bank confirmation is possible in sandbox
next_step.observation: Read 00_inbox/715_next-task.md; the request is to locate a 2026-03-24 EUR 22 bill and confirm with the bank that it is paid.

next_step.current_state: Finance lane rules loaded. Need the purchase subfolder rulebook or the exact bill file to verify the referenced record before deciding on payment confirmation capability.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine whether bank confirmation is supported
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/AGENTS.MD and found finance records are sensitive and financial actions require explicit authorization and exactness.

next_step.current_state: Purchase lane rules loaded. I can now verify the specific bill record named by date and amount before concluding on the bank-confirmation portion.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess sandbox capability for bank confirmation
Report outcome without mutating if unsupported
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/purchases/AGENTS.MD and found trust boundaries must remain strict for purchase records.

next_step.current_state: The requested bill has been verified from the finance record, but confirming payment with a bank requires an external capability not available in the sandbox. Per workflow, I must stop without mutating the workspace.
next_step.observation: Read the purchase record for 2026-03-24 EUR 22 and verified it is bill.toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack with counterparty 深圳市星河玩具配件.

function.message: J’ai retrouvé la facture demandée : le dossier d’achat du 2026-03-24 pour 22 EUR correspond à bill.toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack, contrepartie 深圳市星河玩具配件. En revanche, je ne peux pas confirmer auprès de la banque qu’elle a été payée, car le bac à sable n’expose aucun accès bancaire ni capacité externe de vérification de paiement.
function.rulebook_notes: Bootstrap completed with root AGENTS.MD and context. Followed process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox item as non-canonical, verified the finance record in the canonical lane, and did not mutate or delete the inbox item because completion is blocked by unsupported external confirmation.
function.outcome_justification: The sandbox contains the purchase record proving the bill exists, but confirming payment with a bank would require an external banking/API capability that is not exposed here. Under the unsupported-capability rule, external payment-status confirmation must be reported as OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED rather than approximated locally.
